blocks.body: Answers to Questions — Short and full answers.

{ "title": "11. Short summary", "items": [ "Short answers is the standard way to answer Yes/No questions.", "Structure: Yes/No + Subject + Auxiliary (Yes, I do / No, I don't).", "With do/does/did: we repeat do/does/did in answers.", "With to be: repeat am/is/are/was/were in the answer.", "With modals: repeat the modal verb (can, will, should).", "With have: repeat have/has (have got, Present Perfect) information.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Combination: short answer + additional details = natural conversation." ] }
